requirements.description: Sunita Agarwal is Client CEO responsible for vision, business decisions, and final approvals.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Rajesh Mehta is Client PM responsible for operational requirements, integrations, and technical decisions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Arjun Shah is BA responsible for requirements elicitation and documentation.
requirements.speaker: Arjun Shah

requirements.description: Priya Nair is PM responsible for project delivery, integration planning, and timeline management.
requirements.speaker: Priya Nair

requirements.description: End customers browse, search, and purchase products on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Store managers view regional orders and manage returns via the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Central admin team manages products, pricing, and promotions across the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Vendor partners manage their own inventory and product listings via dedicated login.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Platform must go live within 6 months maximum from project start.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform is deployed and accessible to customers within 6 months.

requirements.description: System must support credit card payments for customer purchases.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can complete purchase using a credit card.

requirements.description: System must support credit card EMI payment option at checkout.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select credit card EMI and complete purchase successfully.

requirements.description: System must integrate with Bajaj Finance API for no-cost EMI financing.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select Bajaj Finance no-cost EMI and receive financing approval.

requirements.description: Bajaj Finance API integration is feasible given existing client agreement.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: ZestMoney partnership agreement may not be finalized before development begins.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: System must provide separate login and portal for vendor partners.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can log in and access only their own listings and inventory.

requirements.description: Vendors must be able to manage their product listings and inventory via portal.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can add, edit, and update inventory for their products.

requirements.description: Vendors cannot set product prices; only RetailCorp central admin controls pricing.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor portal has no price editing capability; price fields are read-only.

requirements.description: Store managers must view orders filtered by their geographic region.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager sees only orders associated with their assigned region.

requirements.description: Store managers must be able to manage customer returns from their region.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager can initiate and process a return for a regional order.

requirements.description: System must support a product catalog of up to 25,000 SKUs.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Platform successfully loads and displays 25,000 SKUs without degradation.

requirements.description: System must integrate with SAP ERP for product data and inventory synchronization.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product and inventory data from SAP is reflected accurately in the platform.

requirements.description: Inventory levels must sync with SAP in real time to prevent overselling.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Inventory update in SAP reflects on platform within 60 seconds.

requirements.description: Product information must sync from SAP via batch process once daily.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product data batch sync from SAP completes successfully once every 24 hours.

requirements.description: Client's existing SAP ERP exposes APIs or data feeds suitable for integration.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: System must provide product search by product name, category, and brand.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results for name, category, and brand queries.

requirements.description: System must support product filtering by price range, brand, ratings, and delivery time.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Applying each filter type returns correctly filtered product results.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to submit product reviews and ratings.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a review and rating for a purchased product.

requirements.description: Admin must moderate and approve customer reviews before they are published.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Review is not visible to customers until admin approves it.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to save products to a wishlist for later purchase.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to wishlist and retrieve it in a later session.

requirements.description: System must integrate with Delhivery API for shipping rates and order tracking.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Shipping rates from Delhivery are displayed at checkout; tracking updates are shown.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to track their orders in real time within the platform.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view live order tracking status on their order detail page.

requirements.description: Platform must comply with GDPR regulations due to NRI customer base.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform passes GDPR compliance audit covering consent, data access, and deletion.

requirements.description: Platform must comply with Indian IT Act regulations.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform meets all applicable Indian IT Act requirements.

requirements.description: All customer data must be stored on servers physically located within India.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Data residency audit confirms no customer data stored outside India.

requirements.description: Platform must handle a minimum of 50,000 concurrent users during peak sale events.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Load test confirms platform remains stable with 50,000 concurrent users.

requirements.description: All platform pages must load within 3 seconds under normal and peak conditions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Performance test confirms page load time is under 3 seconds at peak load.

requirements.description: System must generate sales reports on daily, weekly, and monthly intervals.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate and export sales reports for daily, weekly, and monthly periods.

requirements.description: Sales reports must be filterable by region, product category, and vendor.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Report filtered by region, category, or vendor returns accurate segmented data.

requirements.description: System must provide cart abandonment analytics showing viewed-but-not-purchased products.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Analytics dashboard displays products added to cart but not purchased with counts.

requirements.description: System must support sending promotional emails and SMS to customers.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create and send a promotional email and SMS campaign to customer segments.

requirements.description: A marketing tool or third-party integration will handle email and SMS campaign delivery.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: RetailCorp's 200 physical stores will map to regional groupings for store manager access.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Initial 8,000 SKUs from SAP will be migrated to the platform at launch.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Platform must be scalable to support catalog growth from 8,000 to 25,000 SKUs.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Platform supports 25,000 SKUs without architectural changes or performance degradation.

requirements.description: Products must not be displayed as available if inventory is zero in SAP.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-stock product shows unavailable status within 60 seconds of SAP update.

requirements.description: System must support role-based access control for customers, store managers, admins, and vendors.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Each user role can only access features and data permitted for their role.

requirements.description: Platform must be available during high-traffic sale events such as Diwali without downtime.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform maintains uptime during simulated Diwali-scale load test.

requirements.description: Platform infrastructure must be hosted on India-based servers only.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Infrastructure audit confirms all servers and data storage are India-based.

requirements.description: Delhivery and BlueDart have accessible APIs available for third-party integration.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Average order value of 15,000 INR is used for payment gateway and EMI threshold configuration.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: The system shall allow new customers to register using email or mobile number.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can successfully register using either a valid email address or mobile number.

requirements.description: The system shall allow registered customers to log in via email/password or OTP.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can log in successfully using either email/password or a valid OTP.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to search products by name, brand, or category.
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results when queried by product name, brand, or category.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to filter search results by price, brand, rating, and delivery time.
acceptance_criteria: Applying any filter correctly narrows search results to matching products only.

requirements.description: The system shall display detailed product information on each product detail page.
acceptance_criteria: Product detail page shows name, description, images, price, specifications, and availability.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add one or more products to a shopping cart.
acceptance_criteria: Selected products appear in the cart with correct quantities and prices.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to save products to a personal wishlist.
acceptance_criteria: Saved wishlist products persist across sessions and can be moved to cart.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add and select a delivery address during checkout.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can save a new address and select it as the delivery address before placing an order.

requirements.description: The system shall support payment via credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, and EMI.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can successfully complete a transaction using each supported payment method.

requirements.description: The system shall provide customers with real-time order tracking after purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Order status and estimated delivery time update in real time on the tracking page.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers who purchased a product to submit a review and rating.
acceptance_criteria: Only verified purchasers can submit a review; submission includes a star rating and text.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to approve or reject customer reviews before publication.
acceptance_criteria: Only admin-approved reviews are visible to customers on the product page.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to add, edit, and deactivate products in the catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Admin changes to product status are immediately reflected on the customer-facing catalog.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to set and update product prices and discounts.
acceptance_criteria: Updated prices and discounts are reflected on the product page immediately after admin saves changes.

requirements.description: The system shall sync inventory levels with SAP in real time to reflect accurate stock status.
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-stock products are marked unavailable on the platform within one minute of SAP update.

requirements.description: The system shall allow vendors to manage their own product listings on the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can create, update, and deactivate their own product listings via the vendor portal.

requirements.description: The system shall allow store managers to view all orders within their assigned region.
acceptance_criteria: Store manager dashboard displays only orders belonging to their assigned region.

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admin with sales reports filterable by day, week, month, category, region, and vendor.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate and export a sales report for any supported filter combination.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to view cart abandonment data per product.
acceptance_criteria: Admin dashboard shows products added to cart but not purchased, with abandonment counts.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to send promotional campaigns to customers via email and SMS.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create, schedule, and send a campaign; delivery is confirmed via email and SMS logs.

requirements.description: The system shall provide a fully functional mobile application for Android and iOS platforms.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can browse, search, and complete purchases on both Android and iOS mobile apps.

requirements.description: The system shall provide executives with a mobile dashboard displaying key business metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Executive mobile dashboard displays real-time KPIs including revenue, orders, and conversion rate.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to initiate a return request for a delivered product.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a return request with reason; refund process is triggered upon approval.

requirements.description: The system shall integrate with Delhivery and BlueDart APIs for shipping rate calculation and order tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Shipping rates are auto-calculated at checkout and tracking data is retrieved from Delhivery and BlueDart APIs.

glossary.ShopEase: The e-commerce platform being built for RetailCorp India to enable online retail sales across home appliances, electronics, and furniture.
glossary.RetailCorp India: The client organization, a mid-size retail chain with approximately 200 physical stores across India commissioning the ShopEase platform.
glossary.SKU: Stock Keeping Unit; a unique identifier for each distinct product in the catalog, with an initial launch target of 8,000 and a maximum of 25,000.
glossary.No-Cost EMI: An equated monthly installment payment option where the interest cost is absorbed by the retailer or financing partner, offered via Bajaj Finance and ZestMoney.
glossary.SAP ERP: The client's existing enterprise resource planning system used as the source of truth for product data and inventory levels, integrated via API or batch feed.
glossary.Vendor Portal: A dedicated login interface allowing third-party vendor partners to manage their own product listings and inventory on the ShopEase platform.
glossary.Store Manager: A RetailCorp employee role with access to view and manage orders and returns filtered by their assigned geographic region.
glossary.Central Admin: The RetailCorp team responsible for managing products, pricing, and promotions across the entire platform.
glossary.Delhivery: A third-party logistics provider whose API will be integrated for shipping rate calculation and real-time order tracking.
glossary.Bajaj Finance: A financing partner providing no-cost EMI services to customers, integrated via API into the ShopEase checkout flow.
glossary.Role-Based Access Control: A security mechanism restricting platform features and data access based on a user's assigned role such as customer, store manager, admin, or vendor.
glossary.Cart Abandonment Analytics: A reporting feature that tracks products viewed or added to cart but not purchased, used for marketing and conversion optimization.
glossary.Peak Sale Event: A high-traffic promotional period such as Diwali during which the platform must sustain 50,000 concurrent users without downtime.
glossary.NRI Customer Base: Non-Resident Indian customers whose presence triggers GDPR compliance requirements in addition to Indian IT Act obligations.
glossary.Average Order Value: The typical transaction size of approximately 15,000 INR used as a baseline for configuring payment gateway thresholds and EMI eligibility.
